title: Ride & Dash: Airbikes
description: A datapack adding flying vehicles. Ride in style with these customizeable airbikes !
body:
![Ride & Dash: Airbikes](https://github.com/Geegaz-Datapacks/RideDash/blob/main/img/title.png?raw=true) ## Features: **A new kind of flying vehicle: Airbikes** - Use fire charges as fuel - Fixed with iron ingots - Can be dyed any of the 16 dye colors - Can be decorated with a banner, which can be removed with an axe **Move:** Hold forward / backward (hold both to hover)
**Boost:** Hold jump (1s duration)
**Dash:** Press left / right (1s cooldown) **Recipe** ![Unlocked by getting a saddle](https://github.com/Geegaz-Datapacks/RideDash/blob/main/img/recipe.png?raw=true) ## Installation ### Datapack `rida_.zip` contains both assets & data - copy it in both your datapacks & resourcepacks folders.
`rida__datapack.zip` and `rida__resourcepack.zip` are provided as additional files, if you prefer to download them separately. ### Mod A mod version is provided for convenience. You can install it like any other mod using a launcher like the Modrinth app or by downloading the `.jar`. --- Datapack licenced under MIT - [See full licence](https://github.com/Geegaz-Datapacks/RideDash/blob/main/src/LICENSE_datapack.md)
Resourcepack licenced under CC BY 4.0 - [See full licence](https://github.com/Geegaz-Datapacks/RideDash/blob/main/src/LICENSE_resourcepack.md)
